title: Delicate Australian Cherry Mousse
description: A buttery, velvety mousse that showcases fresh cherries in a light, high-protein Australian dessert.

ingredients.name: Fresh cherries, pitted
ingredients.notes: Fresh or frozen, thawed if frozen

instructions: Blend cherries, yogurt, cream cheese, whey protein, honey, egg yolk, vanilla, lemon zest, and sea salt until smooth.
Whisk cornstarch into 2 tbsp cold water and add to the blender, blending until no lumps remain.
Transfer the mixture to a saucepan and heat over low heat for 5 minutes, stirring constantly until it begins to thicken.
Remove from heat and whisk vigorously for 1 minute to emulsify the mousse.
Chill the mousse in the refrigerator for 30 minutes to set.
If desired, fold in lightly whipped low-fat cream to enhance fluffiness.
Spoon the mousse into serving glasses and chill again for 15 minutes.
Garnish each serving with a few fresh cherries or a sprig of mint before serving.
